decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms bTHDT page-root siblings ai_RNbBKLUh (header CE), ai_RNbBKLUi (sidebar CE), and dashboard-main (ai_RNbBHXRD), and SHELL-05 layout_notes call for a full-width header above the sidebar+main row. DashboardLayout instead nests Header inside the right-hand column for shadcn SidebarProvider + mobile SidebarTrigger integration. Valid structural gap (review G-1), but all named ui_refs (bTHvM0, ai_RNbBKLUc, ai_RNbBKLUe) mount with passing ui_evidence, AC-1 and AC-3 pass, and sidebar+main fluid layout is functional. SHELL-06+ depends_on gates need the composable shell and auth guard, not full-width header span, before advance; page-instance placement markers (ai_RNbBKLUh/ai_RNbBKLUi) land in SHELL-06 and may prompt layout restructure then.

toAuthenticatedRouteObjects() duplicates logic already inlined in App.tsx (authenticatedRouteDefs.map with handle.requiresAuth). AC-2 and FV-2 pass — centralized route defs and ProtectedRoute guard work correctly. Unused-export DRY is routing hygiene only; no downstream depends_on gates on consuming the helper versus inline mapping. Consolidate or remove the export in a future shell/routing polish pass.

Onboarding and Reassessment omitting DashboardLayout is intentional and in scope: AUTH-03-onboarding-wizard-shell owns wizard chrome and step routing on /onboarding (OnboardingWizardShell), distinct from authenticated SPA app shell per AUTH decompose layout_notes. SHELL-05 scope is composing Header/Sidebar/OfflineBanner for SPA pages, not forcing wizard routes into DashboardLayout. Reviewer already marks this acceptable; optional route-grouping comment is documentation polish, not a gap.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 full-width header sibling layout vs shadcn column nesting (shell layout polish, may reconcile when SHELL-06 page-instance markers land); C-2 toAuthenticatedRouteObjects() DRY (routing hygiene). Accepted: C-3 wizard routes correctly omit app shell per AUTH-03 scope.
